infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is required to capture media and register its pHash on-chain.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is required to select media for verification and save captured results.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Photo library access is required to save captured media that includes verification hashes.

plugins.cameraPermission: Camera access is required to capture media and register its pHash on-chain.

plugins.photosPermission: Photo library access is required to select media for verification.
Verity saves captured media with verification hashes to your photo library.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Verity saves captured media with verification hashes to your photo library.
